1→package main
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"fmt"
     5→	"math"
     6→	"math/rand"
     7→	"os"
     8→	"os/exec"
     9→	"runtime"
    10→	"sort"
    11→	"strconv"
    12→	"strings"
    13→	"syscall"
    14→	"time"
    15→
    16→	"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/key"
    17→	tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
    18→	"github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss"
    19→)
    20→
    21→type errMsg error
    22→
    23→type tickMsg time.Time
    24→
    25→type processData struct {
    26→	processes    []Process
    27→	systemStats  SystemStats
    28→	lastUpdate   time.Time
    29→}
    30→
    31→type Process struct {
    32→	PID         int
    33→	Name        string

    35→	CPU         float64
    36→	Memory      float64
    37→	State       string

    39→	StartTime   string
    40→	Command     string
    41→}
    42→
    43→type SystemStats struct {
    44→	CPUCores    int
    45→	CPUUsage    []float64
    46→	MemTotal    uint64
    47→	MemUsed     uint64
    48→	SwapTotal   uint64
    49→	SwapUsed    uint64
    50→	LoadAvg     [3]float64
    51→	Uptime      time.Duration
    52→}
    53→
    54→type NetworkConnection struct {
    55→	Protocol string
    56→	LocalAddr string
    57→	LocalPort string
    58→	RemoteAddr string
    59→	RemotePort string
    60→	State string
    61→	PID int
    62→	ProcessName string
    63→}
    64→
    65→type NetworkInterface struct {
    66→	Name string
    67→	BytesIn uint64
    68→	BytesOut uint64
    69→	PacketsIn uint64
    70→	PacketsOut uint64
    71→	Speed uint64
    72→}
    73→
    74→type SystemAlert struct {
    75→	Type string
    76→	Level string // INFO, WARN, ERROR, CRITICAL
    77→	Message string
    78→	Timestamp time.Time
    79→	Source string
    80→}
    81→
    82→type model struct {
    83→	width       int
    84→	height      int
    85→	frame       int
    86→	quitting    bool
    87→	err         error
    88→	
    89→	// Current view mode
    90→	viewMode    string // "processes", "network", "alerts", "overview"
    91→	
    92→	// Process management
    93→	processes     []Process
    94→	systemStats   SystemStats
    95→	selectedRow   int
    96→	sortColumn    string
    97→	sortReverse   bool
    98→	searchMode    bool
    99→	searchQuery   string
   100→	filteredProcs []Process
   101→	scrollOffset  int
   102→	
   103→	// Network monitoring
   104→	connections []NetworkConnection
   105→	interfaces []NetworkInterface
   106→	networkTraffic []float64 // Recent traffic history
   107→	bandwidthIn []float64
   108→	bandwidthOut []float64
   109→	
   110→	// System alerts
   111→	alerts []SystemAlert
   112→	alertScrollOffset int
   113→	
   114→	// UI state
   115→	showKillDialog bool
   116→	killPID        int
   117→	selectedPanel  int // 0=left, 1=center, 2=right
   118→	
   119→	// Visual effects
   120→	particles     []particle
   121→	cpuHistory    [][]float64
   122→	memHistory    []float64
   123→	networkWaves  []networkWave
   124→}
   125→
   126→type particle struct {
   127→	x, y   float64
   128→	vx, vy float64
   129→	char   rune
   130→	color  string
   131→}
   132→
   133→type networkWave struct {
   134→	x, y   float64
   135→	amplitude float64
   136→	frequency float64
   137→	phase float64
   138→	color string
   139→}
   140→
   141→var (
   142→	neonCyan    = lipgloss.Color("#00FFFF")
   143→	neonMagenta = lipgloss.Color("#FF00FF") 
   144→	neonGreen   = lipgloss.Color("#00FF00")
   145→	neonYellow  = lipgloss.Color("#FFFF00")
   146→	neonRed     = lipgloss.Color("#FF0066")
   147→	darkBg      = lipgloss.Color("#0D0D0D")
   148→)
   149→
   150→var (
   151→	quitKeys = key.NewBinding(
   152→		key.WithKeys("q", "ctrl+c"),
   153→		key.WithHelp("", "press q to quit"),
   154→	)
   155→	
   156→	killKeys = key.NewBinding(
   157→		key.WithKeys("k"),
   158→		key.WithHelp("", "kill process"),
   159→	)
   160→	
   161→	searchKeys = key.NewBinding(
   162→		key.WithKeys("/"),
   163→		key.WithHelp("", "search"),
   164→	)
   165→	
   166→	tabKeys = key.NewBinding(
   167→		key.WithKeys("tab"),
   168→		key.WithHelp("", "switch view"),
   169→	)
   170→)
   171→
   172→func initialModel() model {
   173→	numCores := runtime.NumCPU()
   174→	m := model{
   175→		viewMode:     "overview", // Start with overview
   176→		particles:    make([]particle, 20),
   177→		networkWaves: make([]networkWave, 10),
   178→		cpuHistory:   make([][]float64, numCores),
   179→		memHistory:   make([]float64, 50),
   180→		bandwidthIn:  make([]float64, 50),
   181→		bandwidthOut: make([]float64, 50),
   182→		networkTraffic: make([]float64, 50),
   183→		sortColumn:   "CPU",
   184→		sortReverse:  true,
   185→		selectedRow:  0,
   186→		scrollOffset: 0,
   187→		selectedPanel: 0,
   188→	}
   189→	
   190→	// Initialize CPU history for each core
   191→	for i := range m.cpuHistory {
   192→		m.cpuHistory[i] = make([]float64, 50)
   193→	}
   194→	
   195→	// Initialize floating particles
   196→	for i := range m.particles {
   197→		m.particles[i] = particle{
   198→			x:     rand.Float64() * 100,
   199→			y:     rand.Float64() * 30,
   200→			vx:    (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.3,
   201→			vy:    (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.2,
   202→			char:  []rune("•◦◊◦•○●◎◉▲▼►◄")[rand.Intn(12)],
   203→			color: []string{string(neonCyan), string(neonMagenta), string(neonGreen), string(neonYellow)}[rand.Intn(4)],
   204→		}
   205→	}
   206→	
   207→	// Initialize network waves
   208→	for i := range m.networkWaves {
   209→		m.networkWaves[i] = networkWave{
   210→			x:         rand.Float64() * 100,
   211→			y:         rand.Float64() * 30,
   212→			amplitude: rand.Float64() * 3 + 1,
   213→			frequency: rand.Float64() * 0.5 + 0.1,
   214→			phase:     rand.Float64() * 6.28, // 2π
   215→			color:     []string{string(neonCyan), string(neonMagenta), string(neonGreen)}[rand.Intn(3)],
   216→		}
   217→	}
   218→	
   219→	return m
   220→}
   221→
   222→func (m model) Init() tea.Cmd {
   223→	return tea.Batch(
   224→		tea.EnterAltScreen,
   225→		tick(),
   226→		fetchProcesses(),
   227→		fetchNetworkData(),
   228→		fetchSystemAlerts(),
   229→	)
   230→}
   231→
   232→func tick() tea.Cmd {
   233→	return tea.Tick(time.Millisecond*80, func(t time.Time) tea.Msg {
   234→		return tickMsg(t)
   235→	})
   236→}
   237→
   238→func fetchProcesses() tea.Cmd {
   239→	return func() tea.Msg {
   240→		processes, stats := getProcessesAndStats()
   241→		return processData{
   242→			processes:   processes,
   243→			systemStats: stats,
   244→			lastUpdate:  time.Now(),
   245→		}
   246→	}
   247→}
   248→
   249→type networkData struct {
   250→	connections []NetworkConnection
   251→	interfaces []NetworkInterface
   252→	lastUpdate time.Time
   253→}
   254→
   255→type alertData struct {
   256→	alerts []SystemAlert
   257→	lastUpdate time.Time
   258→}
   259→
   260→func fetchNetworkData() tea.Cmd {
   261→	return func() tea.Msg {
   262→		connections := getNetworkConnections()
   263→		interfaces := getNetworkInterfaces()
   264→		return networkData{
   265→			connections: connections,
   266→			interfaces: interfaces,
   267→			lastUpdate: time.Now(),
   268→		}
   269→	}
   270→}
   271→
   272→func fetchSystemAlerts() tea.Cmd {
   273→	return func() tea.Msg {
   274→		alerts := getSystemAlerts()
   275→		return alertData{
   276→			alerts: alerts,
   277→			lastUpdate: time.Now(),
   278→		}
   279→	}
   280→}
   281→
   282→func (m model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
   283→	switch msg := msg.(type) {
   284→	case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
   285→		m.width = msg.Width
   286→		m.height = msg.Height
   287→		return m, nil
   288→		
   289→	case tea.KeyMsg:
   290→		if m.showKillDialog {
   291→			switch msg.String() {
   292→			case "y", "Y":
   293→				killProcess(m.killPID)
   294→				m.showKillDialog = false
   295→				return m, fetchProcesses()
   296→			case "n", "N", "esc":
   297→				m.showKillDialog = false
   298→				return m, nil
   299→			}
   300→			return m, nil
   301→		}
   302→		
   303→		if m.searchMode {
   304→			switch msg.String() {
   305→			case "esc":
   306→				m.searchMode = false
   307→				m.searchQuery = ""
   308→				m.filteredProcs = m.processes
   309→				return m, nil
   310→			case "enter":
   311→				m.searchMode = false
   312→				return m, nil
   313→			case "backspace":
   314→				if len(m.searchQuery) > 0 {
   315→					m.searchQuery = m.searchQuery[:len(m.searchQuery)-1]
   316→					m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   317→				}
   318→				return m, nil
   319→			default:
   320→				if len(msg.String()) == 1 {
   321→					m.searchQuery += msg.String()
   322→					m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   323→				}
   324→				return m, nil
   325→			}
   326→		}
   327→		
   328→		switch {
   329→		case key.Matches(msg, quitKeys):
   330→			m.quitting = true
   331→			return m, tea.Quit
   332→			
   333→		case key.Matches(msg, tabKeys):
   334→			// Cycle through view modes
   335→			modes := []string{"overview", "processes", "network", "alerts"}
   336→			currentIndex := 0
   337→			for i, mode := range modes {
   338→				if mode == m.viewMode {
   339→					currentIndex = i
   340→					break
   341→				}
   342→			}
   343→			m.viewMode = modes[(currentIndex+1)%len(modes)]
   344→			m.selectedRow = 0
   345→			m.scrollOffset = 0
   346→			return m, nil
   347→			
   348→		case msg.String() == "1":
   349→			m.viewMode = "overview"
   350→			return m, nil
   351→		case msg.String() == "2":
   352→			m.viewMode = "processes"
   353→			return m, nil
   354→		case msg.String() == "3":
   355→			m.viewMode = "network"
   356→			return m, nil
   357→		case msg.String() == "4":
   358→			m.viewMode = "alerts"
   359→			return m, nil
   360→			
   361→		case key.Matches(msg, killKeys):
   362→			if m.viewMode == "processes" && len(m.filteredProcs) > 0 && m.selectedRow < len(m.filteredProcs) {
   363→				m.killPID = m.filteredProcs[m.selectedRow].PID
   364→				m.showKillDialog = true
   365→			}
   366→			return m, nil
   367→			
   368→		case key.Matches(msg, searchKeys):
   369→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   370→				m.searchMode = true
   371→				m.searchQuery = ""
   372→			}
   373→			return m, nil
   374→			
   375→		case msg.String() == "up", msg.String() == "k":
   376→			if m.selectedRow > 0 {
   377→				m.selectedRow--
   378→				if m.selectedRow < m.scrollOffset {
   379→					m.scrollOffset = m.selectedRow
   380→				}
   381→			}
   382→			return m, nil
   383→			
   384→		case msg.String() == "down", msg.String() == "j":
   385→			maxItems := 0
   386→			switch m.viewMode {
   387→			case "processes":
   388→				maxItems = len(m.filteredProcs)
   389→			case "network":
   390→				maxItems = len(m.connections)
   391→			case "alerts":
   392→				maxItems = len(m.alerts)
   393→			}
   394→			
   395→			if m.selectedRow < maxItems-1 {
   396→				m.selectedRow++
   397→				visibleRows := m.height - 12
   398→				if m.selectedRow >= m.scrollOffset+visibleRows {
   399→					m.scrollOffset = m.selectedRow - visibleRows + 1
   400→				}
   401→			}
   402→			return m, nil
   403→			
   404→		case msg.String() == "c":
   405→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   406→				m.sortColumn = "CPU"
   407→				m.sortProcesses()
   408→			}
   409→			return m, nil
   410→			
   411→		case msg.String() == "m":
   412→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   413→				m.sortColumn = "Memory"
   414→				m.sortProcesses()
   415→			}
   416→			return m, nil
   417→			
   418→		case msg.String() == "p":
   419→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   420→				m.sortColumn = "PID"
   421→				m.sortProcesses()
   422→			}
   423→			return m, nil
   424→		}
   425→		
   426→		return m, nil
   427→		
   428→	case tickMsg:
   429→		m.frame++
   430→		
   431→		// Update particles
   432→		for i := range m.particles {
   433→			p := &m.particles[i]
   434→			p.x += p.vx
   435→			p.y += p.vy
   436→			
   437→			if p.x < 0 || p.x > 100 {
   438→				p.vx *= -1
   439→			}
   440→			if p.y < 0 || p.y > 30 {
   441→				p.vy *= -1
   442→			}
   443→		}
   444→		
   445→		// Update network waves
   446→		for i := range m.networkWaves {
   447→			w := &m.networkWaves[i]
   448→			w.phase += 0.1
   449→			w.x += 0.5
   450→			if w.x > 100 {
   451→				w.x = 0
   452→			}
   453→		}
   454→		
   455→		// Fetch new data periodically
   456→		var cmds []tea.Cmd
   457→		if m.frame%25 == 0 { // ~2 seconds
   458→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchProcesses())
   459→		}
   460→		if m.frame%30 == 0 { // ~2.4 seconds  
   461→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchNetworkData())
   462→		}
   463→		if m.frame%50 == 0 { // ~4 seconds
   464→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchSystemAlerts())
   465→		}
   466→		
   467→		cmds = append(cmds, tick())
   468→		return m, tea.Batch(cmds...)
   469→		
   470→	case processData:
   471→		m.processes = msg.processes
   472→		m.systemStats = msg.systemStats
   473→		
   474→		// Update CPU history
   475→		for i, usage := range msg.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   476→			if i < len(m.cpuHistory) {
   477→				m.cpuHistory[i] = append(m.cpuHistory[i][1:], usage)
   478→			}
   479→		}
   480→		
   481→		// Update memory history
   482→		memUsagePercent := float64(msg.systemStats.MemUsed) / float64(msg.systemStats.MemTotal) * 100
   483→		m.memHistory = append(m.memHistory[1:], memUsagePercent)
   484→		
   485→		// Sort and filter processes
   486→		m.sortProcesses()
   487→		m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   488→		
   489→		// Ensure selected row is valid
   490→		if m.selectedRow >= len(m.filteredProcs) {
   491→			m.selectedRow = len(m.filteredProcs) - 1
   492→		}
   493→		if m.selectedRow < 0 {
   494→			m.selectedRow = 0
   495→		}
   496→		
   497→		return m, nil
   498→		
   499→	case networkData:
   500→		m.connections = msg.connections
   501→		m.interfaces = msg.interfaces
   502→		
   503→		// Update bandwidth history (simulate for now)
   504→		totalIn := 0.0
   505→		totalOut := 0.0
   506→		for _, iface := range msg.interfaces {
   507→			totalIn += float64(iface.BytesIn)
   508→			totalOut += float64(iface.BytesOut)
   509→		}
   510→		
   511→		m.bandwidthIn = append(m.bandwidthIn[1:], totalIn/1024/1024) // MB
   512→		m.bandwidthOut = append(m.bandwidthOut[1:], totalOut/1024/1024) // MB
   513→		m.networkTraffic = append(m.networkTraffic[1:], (totalIn+totalOut)/1024/1024)
   514→		
   515→		return m, nil
   516→		
   517→	case alertData:
   518→		// Add new alerts to the beginning
   519→		for _, alert := range msg.alerts {
   520→			m.alerts = append([]SystemAlert{alert}, m.alerts...)
   521→		}
   522→		
   523→		// Keep only last 100 alerts
   524→		if len(m.alerts) > 100 {
   525→			m.alerts = m.alerts[:100]
   526→		}
   527→		
   528→		return m, nil
   529→		
   530→	case errMsg:
   531→		m.err = msg
   532→		return m, nil
   533→		
   534→	default:
   535→		return m, nil
   536→	}
   537→}

   622→// Network data fetching
   623→func getNetworkConnections() []NetworkConnection {
   624→	connections := []NetworkConnection{}
   625→	
   626→	// Get network connections using netstat
   627→	cmd := exec.Command("netstat", "-an")
   628→	output, err := cmd.Output()
   629→	if err != nil {
   630→		return connections
   631→	}
   632→	
   633→	lines := strings.Split(string(output), "\n")
   634→	for i, line := range lines {
   635→		if i < 2 || strings.TrimSpace(line) == "" {
   636→			continue // Skip headers
   637→		}
   638→		
   639→		fields := strings.Fields(line)
   640→		if len(fields) < 4 {
   641→			continue
   642→		}
   643→		
   644→		protocol := fields[0]
   645→		localAddr := fields[3]
   646→		var remoteAddr, state string
   647→		
   648→		if len(fields) >= 5 {
   649→			remoteAddr = fields[4]
   650→		}
   651→		if len(fields) >= 6 {
   652→			state = fields[5]
   653→		}
   654→		
   655→		// Parse addresses
   656→		localParts := strings.Split(localAddr, ":")
   657→		remoteParts := strings.Split(remoteAddr, ":")
   658→		
   659→		conn := NetworkConnection{
   660→			Protocol: protocol,
   661→			State: state,
   662→		}
   663→		
   664→		if len(localParts) >= 2 {
   665→			conn.LocalAddr = strings.Join(localParts[:len(localParts)-1], ":")
   666→			conn.LocalPort = localParts[len(localParts)-1]
   667→		}
   668→		
   669→		if len(remoteParts) >= 2 {
   670→			conn.RemoteAddr = strings.Join(remoteParts[:len(remoteParts)-1], ":")
   671→			conn.RemotePort = remoteParts[len(remoteParts)-1]
   672→		}
   673→		
   674→		connections = append(connections, conn)
   675→	}
   676→	
   677→	return connections
   678→}

   731→// Process management functions
   732→func getProcessesAndStats() ([]Process, SystemStats) {
   733→	processes := []Process{}
   734→	stats := SystemStats{
   735→		CPUCores: runtime.NumCPU(),
   736→		CPUUsage: make([]float64, runtime.NumCPU()),
   737→	}
   738→	
   739→	// Get processes using ps command
   740→	cmd := exec.Command("ps", "ax", "-o", "pid,user,pcpu,pmem,stat,ppid,etime,comm")
   741→	output, err := cmd.Output()
   742→	if err != nil {
   743→		return processes, stats
   744→	}
   745→	
   746→	lines := strings.Split(string(output), "\n")
   747→	for i, line := range lines {
   748→		if i == 0 || strings.TrimSpace(line) == "" {
   749→			continue // Skip header and empty lines
   750→		}
   751→		
   752→		fields := strings.Fields(line)
   753→		if len(fields) < 8 {
   754→			continue
   755→		}
   756→		
   757→		pid, _ := strconv.Atoi(fields[0])
   758→		cpu, _ := strconv.ParseFloat(fields[2], 64)
   759→		mem, _ := strconv.ParseFloat(fields[3], 64)
   760→		ppid, _ := strconv.Atoi(fields[5])
   761→		
   762→		process := Process{
   763→			PID:       pid,
   764→			User:      fields[1],
   765→			CPU:       cpu,
   766→			Memory:    mem,
   767→			State:     fields[4],
   768→			PPID:      ppid,
   769→			StartTime: fields[6],
   770→			Name:      fields[7],
   771→			Command:   strings.Join(fields[7:], " "),
   772→		}
   773→		processes = append(processes, process)
   774→	}
   775→	
   776→	// Get memory info
   777→	cmd = exec.Command("sysctl", "-n", "hw.memsize")
   778→	if output, err := cmd.Output(); err == nil {
   779→		if total, err := strconv.ParseUint(strings.TrimSpace(string(output)), 10, 64); err == nil {
   780→			stats.MemTotal = total
   781→		}
   782→	}
   783→	
   784→	// Get memory usage (simplified)
   785→	var m runtime.MemStats
   786→	runtime.ReadMemStats(&m)
   787→	stats.MemUsed = m.Alloc
   788→	
   789→	// Simulate CPU usage per core
   790→	for i := range stats.CPUUsage {
   791→		stats.CPUUsage[i] = math.Max(0, math.Min(100, math.Sin(float64(time.Now().UnixNano()/1000000000+int64(i)))*30+50+rand.Float64()*20))
   792→	}
   793→	
   794→	// Get load average
   795→	cmd = exec.Command("sysctl", "-n", "vm.loadavg")
   796→	if output, err := cmd.Output(); err == nil {
   797→		parts := strings.Fields(strings.TrimSpace(string(output)))
   798→		if len(parts) >= 3 {
   799→			stats.LoadAvg[0], _ = strconv.ParseFloat(parts[1], 64)
   800→			stats.LoadAvg[1], _ = strconv.ParseFloat(parts[2], 64)
   801→			stats.LoadAvg[2], _ = strconv.ParseFloat(parts[3], 64)
   802→		}
   803→	}
   804→	
   805→	return processes, stats
   806→}

   812→func (m *model) sortProcesses() {
   813→	sort.Slice(m.processes, func(i, j int) bool {
   814→		switch m.sortColumn {
   815→		case "CPU":
   816→			if m.sortReverse {
   817→				return m.processes[i].CPU > m.processes[j].CPU
   818→			}
   819→			return m.processes[i].CPU < m.processes[j].CPU
   820→		case "Memory":
   821→			if m.sortReverse {
   822→				return m.processes[i].Memory > m.processes[j].Memory
   823→			}
   824→			return m.processes[i].Memory < m.processes[j].Memory
   825→		case "PID":
   826→			if m.sortReverse {
   827→				return m.processes[i].PID > m.processes[j].PID
   828→			}
   829→			return m.processes[i].PID < m.processes[j].PID
   830→		default:
   831→			return m.processes[i].PID < m.processes[j].PID
   832→		}
   833→	})
   834→}

   836→func filterProcesses(processes []Process, query string) []Process {
   837→	if query == "" {
   838→		return processes
   839→	}
   840→	
   841→	filtered := []Process{}
   842→	query = strings.ToLower(query)
   843→	
   844→	for _, p := range processes {
   845→		if strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(p.Name), query) ||
   846→			strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(p.User), query) ||
   847→			strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(p.Command), query) {
   848→			filtered = append(filtered, p)
   849→		}
   850→	}
   851→	
   852→	return filtered
   853→}

   918→func (m model) renderProcessList() string {

   926→

   928→		Foreground(neonMagenta).
   929→		Bold(true).
   930→		Render(headerText)
   931→	
   932→	s.WriteString(header + "\n")

   941→

   947→	
   948→	// Process rows

   950→	startIdx := m.scrollOffset
   951→	endIdx := startIdx + visibleRows
   952→

   954→		endIdx = len(m.filteredProcs)
   955→	}
   956→	
   957→	for i := startIdx; i < endIdx; i++ {

   959→			break
   960→		}
   961→		
   962→		proc := m.filteredProcs[i]
   963→		isSelected := i == m.selectedRow
   964→		
   965→		// Process state colors
   966→		stateColor := neonGreen
   967→		switch proc.State {
   968→		case "R", "R+":
   969→			stateColor = neonGreen
   970→		case "S", "S+":
   971→			stateColor = neonCyan
   972→		case "T":

   975→			stateColor = neonRed

   978→		// CPU color based on usage

   980→		if proc.CPU > 50 {

   982→		} else if proc.CPU > 25 {
   983→			cpuColor = neonYellow
   984→		}
   985→		
   986→		// Memory color

   993→		
   994→		// Truncate command if too long

  1001→		pidText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(8).Render(fmt.Sprintf("%d", proc.PID))
  1002→		userText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(12).Render(proc.User)
  1003→		cpuText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(cpuColor).Width(8).Render(fmt.Sprintf("%.1f", proc.CPU))

  1090→func formatBytes(bytes uint64) string {
  1091→	const unit = 1024
  1092→	if bytes < unit {
  1093→		return fmt.Sprintf("%d B", bytes)
  1094→	}
  1095→	div, exp := int64(unit), 0
  1096→	for n := bytes / unit; n >= unit; n /= unit {
  1097→		div *= unit
  1098→		exp++
  1099→	}
  1100→	return fmt.Sprintf("%.1f %cB", float64(bytes)/float64(div), "KMGTPE"[exp])
  1101→}

  1107→	return b

  1391→func renderBar(value, max float64, width int, colorLow, colorHigh lipgloss.Color) string {
  1392→	filled := int((value / max) * float64(width))
  1393→	if filled > width {
  1394→		filled = width
  1395→	}
  1396→	
  1397→	bar := strings.Repeat("█", filled) + strings.Repeat("░", width-filled)
  1398→	
  1399→	color := colorLow
  1400→	if value/max > 0.7 {
  1401→		color = colorHigh
  1402→	}
  1403→	
  1404→	return lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(color).Render(bar)
  1405→}
